episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 356: Magic the Gathering 2022 Year in Review
episode.description: James & Derek walk you through the Metagame Week in Review, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and look back at 2022 through the lens of Magic the Gathering, breaking down the best and worst specs and products of the year.
